calibration.repoShape: CJS Node web framework package with lib entry modules
calibration.safetyPosture: Clone-only source scan; no target installs, package-manager scripts, target tests, target builds, submodules, or npx were run.
calibration.scopeQuestion: Can an inferred lib-scope baseline make patch-version architecture drift reviewable for a non-workspace CJS framework package?
calibration.commandSurface: axi infer --json + axi graph --json + axi diff + axi observe --baseline
calibration.mainSignal: The patch-version lib graph stayed drift-quiet; one deep internal import advisory marks Express router entry wiring rather than a resolver gap.
calibration.decision: Do not change validator behavior; keep this as a quiet-ish CJS framework control with one reviewable deep-import advisory.
calibration.codeChanged: No Axiom code changed; this is a no-install calibration run.
calibration.followUp: Compare with other framework/tool packages before changing resolver or warning behavior.

reviewStory.summary: Starter contract inferred 3 modules and 2 observed module edges from 11 source files.
reviewStory.setup: Scanned 11 source files and 86 imports; 3 candidate groups became 3 starter modules. This is a current-graph snapshot, not declared architecture intent yet.

pressures.title: Large-file pressure in inferred scope
pressures.description: 1 large source file may hide responsibilities that folder and import inference cannot split. Inspect these files before judging the starter module map as complete.

pressures.title: Review inferred dependencies
pressures.description: 2 observed module edges became `depends on` lines with sample import evidence. Confirm each edge is intended before using this draft as a gate.

reviewStory.nextStep: Inspect large-file pressure notes, adjust module boundaries if needed, then run `axi observe --root . --spec <draft.axi> --markdown`.
reviewStory.caveat: Inference reads static imports and folder/package shape. It can lower authoring cost, but humans still decide module names, visibility, layers, accepted debt, and which edges are real architecture intent.

architecturePressureNotes.message: lib/response.js has 1170 lines; inferred module boundaries may miss responsibilities concentrated inside this file.

details.message: Lib imports LibRouter through a deep relative path instead of a likely source-group entry point.
